vl16.description: Multimodal parsing for complex documents with structured Markdown output.
vl16.fit: Papers, scanned books, complex layouts, and handwriting

ppOcrV6.description: Fast scene-text recognition with broad language support.
ppOcrV6.fit: Screenshots, photos, street scenes, and identity documents

structureV3.description: Preserves layout structure and precise coordinates for structured extraction.
structureV3.fit: Table extraction, searchable PDFs, and layout reconstruction
